title: Talk with your teen about vaping: Poster  - Canada.ca
content:
## Talk with your teen about vaping: Poster
Download the alternative format (PDF format, 180 KB, 1 page)
Be patient /  Get support / Keep the conversation going
Vaping  nicotine can:
- lead to nicotine addiction
- harm healthy teen brain development
- reduce impulse control
- make it harder to concentrate, learn and manage emotions
Get  your tip sheet at Canada.ca/vaping
